name: telecommunications_biometric_millhaven_tru_loy
premise: Peering, lawful process, and uptime commitments are all in conflict. A carrier network operations center is managing degraded service or lawful-intercept adjacent requests with customer impact. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: telecommunications biometric millhaven tru loy. The moral tension is explicitly framed as truth versus loyalty: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Two upstream teams have published contradictory status pages; customers are comparing timestamps. The breach-notification and customer-communication clock has started; executive staff expect a single coherent position before the next press cycle. Treat unverified telemetry as hypothesis; do not assert facts you cannot support from retained logs. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident.

agents.name: Priya Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Priya Vasquez, the accountable decision-maker on this Telecommunications bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes loyalty whenever someone invokes truth.

agents.name: Darius Silva
agents.identity: I am Darius Silva, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so loyalty is not sacrificed by default just because truth feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Priya Vasquez must decide under truth versus loyalty. What does Priya Vasquez do?
